name: Plum Tomato Sauce with Portabella Mushrooms
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove stems from mushrooms.
2. Mix flour and Creole seasoning.
3. Dredge mushroom caps in the flour mixture.
4. Sauté in olive oil until golden brown.
5. Make tomato sauce:
a. In hot olive oil, sauté onion and garlic for 1-2 minutes.
b. Add basil, pepper, and salt.
c. Add tomatoes and cook until juices are extracted.
d. Stir in chicken broth and cook for about three minutes.
e. Add butter and season with additional salt and pepper.
6. Cook Angel hair pasta in lightly salted boiling water for 1-2 minutes.
7. Place the blanched pasta in serving bowls.
8. Top with sautéed mushroom caps, drizzle with sauce, and sprinkle with freshly grated Parmesan cheese.
